title: Question Mark (? vs ?. vs ?? vs ? :) in Swift
summary: In Swift, the question mark works differently in different situations or when clubbed with some other keywords. It sometimes denotes the variable type as optional or sometimes being used for optional chaining.
content: In Swift, the question mark works differently in different situations or when clubbed with some other keywords. It sometimes denotes the variable type as optional or sometimes being used for optional chaining.
